name: From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the Valais region
description: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the Valais region in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva or Geneva Airport: transfer to popular places in the Valais region in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Transfer
subcategory.description: Book a transfer and get to your destination comfortably. A transfer is made by car or bus between two places. Very often it is a transfer from or to the airport. For bookable transfers, the starting point or destination is usually fixed (for example, the airport in Geneva). For the opposite, a city or place is fixed. Private transfers ensure you and your fellow travelers a comfortable ride to the destination

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Andermatt: picturesque landscape with mountains and the charming village in summer.
Brig: magnificent architecture with historic towers in the heart of Switzerland.
Champery: impressive mountain landscape with snow-capped peaks and green valleys.
Crans Montana: Picturesque landscape with mountains, lake, and autumnal vegetation. Ideal for nature lovers.
Fiesch: Snow-covered mountain houses in winter with a breathtaking view of the Alps.
Grimentz: Beautiful mountain village with traditional chalets and stunning mountain scenery in summer.
Leukerbad: Relax in the warm spring water surrounded by mountains in winter.
Saas Fee: picturesque mountain landscape with traditional chalets and surrounding Alps in winter.
Verbier features picturesque chalets in the snow, ideal for your winter vacation in the mountains.
Zermatt: breathtaking view of the Matterhorn Lake with mountains and clear sky, beautiful year-round.
